items.title_en: Why is Orange County chemical tank crisis so hard to fix? - Los Angeles Times
items.title_zh: 为什么奥兰治县化学罐危机如此难以解决？ - 洛杉矶时报

items.title_en: 'Fjord,' Norway-set drama about political polarization, wins Palme d’Or at Cannes
items.title_zh: 以挪威为背景、讲述政治两极分化的剧情片《峡湾》荣获戛纳金棕榈奖
items.desc_en: "Fjord" found wide admiration for its engrossing tale of what Mungiu called "left-wing fundamentalism."
items.desc_zh: 《峡湾》因其引人入胜的故事而广受赞誉，蒙吉乌称之为“左翼原教旨主义”。

items.title_en: California declares state of emergency as fire crews race to contain toxic chemical leak
items.title_zh: 加州宣布进入紧急状态，消防人员竞相遏制有毒化学品泄漏
items.desc_en: Thousands have been evacuated as officials warn a tank containing about 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate could explode.
items.desc_zh: 由于官员警告称，一个装有约 7,000 加仑甲基丙烯酸甲酯的储罐可能会爆炸，数千人已被疏散。

items.title_en: Iran 'getting a lot closer' to agreement with US, Trump says
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗与美国达成协议“更加接近”
items.desc_en: Tehran also signals progress on talks but says the key issue of nuclear weapons is not part of an initial framework it is working on.
items.desc_zh: 德黑兰也表示谈判取得了进展，但表示核武器的关键问题并不是其正在制定的初步框架的一部分。

items.title_en: Stephen Colbert returns to TV in appearance on local Michigan station
items.title_zh: 斯蒂芬·科尔伯特重返电视节目并出现在密歇根当地电视台
items.desc_en: A day after his last episode of “The Late Show” on CBS, Colbert found his way back to a television hosting gig for one night.
items.desc_zh: 在哥伦比亚广播公司 (CBS) 播出最后一集《深夜秀》后的第二天，科尔伯特又回到电视主持了一晚。

items.title_en: Nascar champion Kyle Busch died of pneumonia and sepsis, family says
items.title_zh: 纳斯卡冠军凯尔·布施家人称死于肺炎和败血症
items.desc_en: The driver died aged 41 on Thursday after "overwhelming complications" from the illnesses.
items.desc_zh: 周四，这名司机因疾病“严重并发症”去世，享年 41 岁。

items.desc_zh: 红十字会表示，他们被认为是在疫情爆发之前就感染了病毒。

items.title_en: Kyle Busch died after severe pneumonia progressed into sepsis, his family says
items.title_zh: 凯尔·布​​施 (Kyle Busch) 家人称，严重肺炎发展为败血症后死亡
items.desc_en: Busch, a two-time NASCAR champion, died at 41 on Thursday, a day after passing out in a Chevrolet simulator.
items.desc_zh: 两届 NASCAR 冠军布施周四在雪佛兰模拟器中昏倒一天后去世，享年 41 岁。

items.title_en: U.S. and Iran are closing in on a 60-day ceasefire extension with nuclear framework, FT reports
items.title_zh: 据英国《金融时报》报道，美国和伊朗即将在核框架下延长 60 天停火
items.desc_en: A fragile ceasefire has been in place since April 8, punctuated by skirmishes as the U.S. and Iran jockey over the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 自 4 月 8 日以来，脆弱的停火已经生效，美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡争夺时不时发生小规模冲突。

items.title_en: U.S. adds Atlanta area airport for Ebola screening, CDC says
items.title_zh: 疾病预防控制中心称，美国增加亚特兰大地区机场用于埃博拉病毒筛查
items.desc_en: Washington's Dulles International Airport was designated this week to screen returning citizens for the Ebola virus.
items.desc_zh: 华盛顿杜勒斯国际机场本周被指定对回国公民进行埃博拉病毒筛查。

items.title_en: F1 great Prost 'injured as masked gang raid home'
items.title_zh: F1伟大的普罗斯特“因蒙面团伙袭击回家而受伤”
items.desc_en: Four-time Formula 1 world champion Alain Prost was injured when a masked gang raided his home near Geneva, Swiss media reports.
items.desc_zh: 据瑞士媒体报道，四届一级方程式世界冠军阿兰·普罗斯特在蒙面团伙袭击他位于日内瓦附近的家时受伤。

items.title_en: India's parody 'cockroach party' claims website has been blocked
items.title_zh: 印度模仿“蟑螂党”声称网站已被封锁
items.desc_en: The satirical group has gained millions of followers as "the voice of the lazy and unemployed".
items.desc_zh: 该讽刺团体作为“懒惰者和失业者的声音”获得了数百万追随者。

items.title_en: Millennials spend $252 on an average date, BMO finds — and social media is spiraling over 'date-flation'
items.title_zh: BMO 发现，千禧一代平均在约会上花费 252 美元，而社交媒体正因“约会膨胀”而急剧上升
items.desc_en: Dating costs are rising faster than inflation, pushing many Americans to go on fewer dates, choose cheaper plans or skip dating altogether.
items.desc_zh: 约会成本的上涨速度快于通货膨胀，迫使许多美国人减少约会次数、选择更便宜的计划或干脆不约会。

items.title_en: These stocks have plenty of upside as June approaches, Bank of America says
items.title_zh: 美国银行表示，随着六月的临近，这些股票有很大的上涨空间
items.desc_en: The firm named five stocks that have plenty more room to run in June and beyond.
items.desc_zh: 该公司列出了五只股票，这些股票在六月及以后还有很大的上涨空间。

items.title_en: French pair held until trial after boys abandoned by road in Portugal
items.title_zh: 葡萄牙两名男孩被遗弃在公路上，法国夫妇被拘留直至受审
items.desc_en: The couple, who allegedly left two young boys on a roadside in the south of Portugal, will remain in custody, a court rules.
items.desc_zh: 法院裁定，这对夫妇据称将两名年幼的男孩留在葡萄牙南部的路边，目前仍将被拘留。

items.title_en: Stock market returns are often subpar after a strong 3-year streak, history shows
items.title_zh: 历史显示，在连续三年强劲表现后，股市回报率往往低于平均水平
items.desc_en: While the market has posted solid double-digit returns in the past three years, investors shouldn't get their hopes up that the trend will continue.
items.desc_zh: 尽管市场在过去三年中取得了稳定的两位数回报，但投资者不应抱有这种趋势将持续下去的希望。

items.title_en: Americans are feeling inflation's pinch into the holiday weekend. Here's where prices are rising the most
items.title_zh: 美国人在假期周末感受到通货膨胀的压力。这里是物价涨幅最大的地方
items.desc_en: Prices related to travel, recreation and food saw particularly steep increases, stretching Americans' wallets as they celebrate the unofficial start of summer.
items.desc_zh: 与旅行、娱乐和食品相关的价格上涨尤其剧烈，在美国人庆祝夏季非正式开始之际，他们的钱包捉襟见肘。

items.title_en: Nvidia says its forecast for $200 billion CPU market includes China
items.title_zh: Nvidia表示，其预计2000亿美元的CPU市场包括中国
items.desc_en: Nvidia's latest forecast signals it still sees significant long-term demand for central processing units.
items.desc_zh: 英伟达的最新预测表明，它仍然认为对中央处理器的长期需求很大。

items.title_en: High fuel prices test limits of summer vacation spending
items.title_zh: 高油价考验暑假消费极限
items.desc_en: The unofficial start of the summer travel season on Memorial Day weekend will show just how much travelers want to fly and how much they're willing to pay.
items.desc_zh: 阵亡将士纪念日周末夏季旅游季的非正式开始将显示出有多少旅客想要乘坐飞机以及他们愿意支付多少钱。

items.title_en: ‘Blue dot fever’? What's really behind a tricky summer dynamic for live music
items.title_zh: “蓝点热”？夏季现场音乐的棘手动态背后的真正原因是什么
items.desc_en: As prices rise everywhere, consumers are choosing to be more intentional with how they're spending on live music and concerts this year.
items.desc_zh: 随着各地物价上涨，消费者今年在现场音乐和音乐会上的支出变得更加谨慎。

items.title_en: Magnitude 6 earthquake strikes Hawaii’s Big Island; USGS assessing Kilauea volcano
items.title_zh: 夏威夷大岛发生 6 级地震；美国地质勘探局评估基拉韦厄火山
items.desc_en: Kilauea, one of the world's most active volcanoes, is located on Hawaii's Big Island.
items.desc_zh: 基拉韦厄火山是世界上最活跃的火山之一，位于夏威夷大岛。

items.title_zh: 一场致命的龙卷风将密苏里州乔普林聚集在一起 15 年后，善良仍在继续 - NPR

items.title_en: Senegal's president sacks prime minister Sonko after months of tensions
items.title_zh: 紧张局势数月后塞内加尔总统解雇总理桑科
items.desc_en: Bassirou Diomaye Faye also dissolved the government, creating uncertainty amid a debt crisis in the country.
items.desc_zh: 巴西鲁·迪马耶·法耶还解散了政府，给该国的债务危机带来了不确定性。

items.title_en: DR Congo players told to isolate before World Cup
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国球员被告知在世界杯前隔离
items.desc_en: The Democratic Republic of Congo's World Cup squad must isolate for 21 days before they can enter the US because of the Ebola outbreak.
items.desc_zh: 由于埃博拉疫情爆发，刚果民主共和国参加世界杯的球队必须隔离21天才能进入美国。

items.title_en: At least 90 dead in Chinese coal mine explosion, state media reports
items.title_zh: 官方媒体报道中国煤矿爆炸至少90人死亡
items.desc_en: The explosion took place at 19:29 local time on Friday at a coal mine in northern China.
items.desc_zh: 当地时间周五19时29分，中国北方一煤矿发生爆炸。

items.title_zh: 特朗普政府强制在美外国人申请海外绿卡 - NPR

items.desc_zh: 美国最高外交官发表声明，表示愿意支持印度的能源需求，但德里应该屈服吗？

items.title_en: SpaceX launches massive Starship V3 rocket on test flight
items.title_zh: SpaceX 发射大型 Starship V3 火箭进行试飞
items.desc_en: The first attempted launch on Thursday was postponed due to a malfunctioning hydraulic pin in the launch tower.
items.desc_zh: 由于发射塔中的液压销故障，周四的首次发射尝试被推迟。

items.title_en: From decades to years - AI could speed search for brain drugs hiding in plain sight
items.title_zh: 从几十年到几年——人工智能可以加速寻找隐藏在视线中的大脑药物
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望这项工作将有助于找到负担得起的、有效的药物来治疗 MND 等疾病。

items.title_en: Gaza flotilla activists allege abuse by Israeli forces while detained
items.title_zh: 加沙船队活动人士声称以色列军队在被拘留期间实施虐待行为
items.desc_en: The detainees say they were slapped, hit, humiliated and even subjected to sexual violence, but Israel's prison service says the allegations are false.
items.desc_zh: 被拘留者称，他们遭到掌掴、殴打、羞辱，甚至遭受性暴力，但以色列监狱部门表示，这些指控是虚假的。

items.desc_zh: BTR 预计阵亡将士纪念日出行将激增 巴吞鲁日商业报告精神崩溃、高油价考验暑假支出极限 CNBC 阵亡将士纪念日出行预测：汽油价格、交通流量

items.title_en: Tulsi Gabbard to resign as US director of national intelligence
items.title_zh: 图尔西·加巴德辞去美国国家情报总监职务
items.desc_en: Gabbard who has been largely out of public view during recent US operations says she is leaving due to her husband's illness.
items.desc_zh: 加巴德在最近的美国行动中基本上淡出公众视野，她表示，由于丈夫生病，她将离开。

items.title_en: Russia's Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯总统普京在指责乌克兰袭击学生宿舍后誓言进行报复
items.desc_en: Ukraine said it hit Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied part of eastern Ukraine.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰表示，它在莫斯科占领的乌克兰东部地区袭击了俄罗斯精锐的“卢比孔河”无人机军事部队。

items.title_en: Disney's 'Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu' tallies lowest Thursday preview sales in franchise history
items.title_zh: 迪士尼《星球大战：曼达洛人和格罗古》周四预览销量创下系列历史最低纪录
items.desc_en: Disney's "Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu" tallied $12 million in Thursday night previews, the lowest collection of advanced tickets in franchise history.
items.desc_zh: 迪士尼的《星球大战：曼达洛人和格罗古》在周四晚上的预演中票房收入为 1200 万美元，这是该系列电影历史上预售门票收入最低的一次。

items.title_en: Here's the case for 9,000 on the S&P 500 by the middle of next year, according to JPMorgan
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，到明年年中，标准普尔 500 指数将出现 9,000 点的情况
items.desc_en: Higher productivity could be even more supportive of the stock market than previously thought.
items.desc_zh: 更高的生产率可能比之前想象的更能支持股市。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车
items.desc_en: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。

items.title_en: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
items.title_zh: 《命运 2》粉丝对支持即将结束的消息反应“无言以对”
items.desc_en: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
items.desc_zh: Bungie 表示，这款在线射击游戏将于 6 月 9 日获得最终更新，但仍然可以玩。

items.desc_zh: 就在一天前，该公司公布了破纪录的股票上市计划。

items.title_zh: 爱如实：约会初创公司承诺减少作弊行为

items.desc_zh: 对虚假约会资料的失望催生了采用不同方法的新约会服务。

items.title_en: UK police bosses urge unsafe platforms to be blocked for under-16s
items.title_zh: 英国警察局长敦促封锁 16 岁以下青少年的不安全平台
items.desc_en: The NCA and NPCC say children should be blocked from accessing sites which do not stop them seeing nudes or being contacted by strangers.
items.desc_zh: NCA 和 NPCC 表示，应该阻止儿童访问不能阻止他们看到裸体或与陌生人联系的网站。

items.title_zh: Meta 与美国学区解决社交媒体成瘾案

items.desc_zh: 该审判已被定为其他 1200 个做出类似主张的学区的测试案例。

items.title_en: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
items.title_zh: Ofcom 表示 TikTok 和 YouTube 对儿童来说“不够安全”
items.desc_en: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.
items.desc_zh: YouTube 表示，它与专家合作提供适当的体验。 TikTok 表示，对于 Ofcom 没有承认其安全功能感到失望。

items.title_en: SpaceX files for IPO that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
items.title_zh: SpaceX 申请 IPO 可能使埃隆·马斯克成为万亿富翁
items.desc_en: Musk's rocket-maker and satellite internet provider will trade under the ticker SPCX
items.desc_zh: 马斯克的火箭制造商和卫星互联网提供商将以股票代码 SPCX 进行交易

items.title_en: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
items.title_zh: 美国团体敦促对儿童安全和 Roblox 支出进行调查
items.desc_en: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。

items.title_en: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop
items.title_zh: 谷歌将推出自谷歌眼镜失败以来首款智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.
items.desc_zh: 这款眼镜将于秋季某个时候上市销售，让谷歌的人工智能产品能够与用户互动。

items.desc_zh: 加利福尼亚州奥克兰的试验揭开了人工智能领域的面纱，以及该领域核心人物的巨大自负。
